Table must not be pasted in image format, must be editable
All text must be properly aligned (justified)

ANALYZING THE PITFALLS, IDENTIFYING THE DEPENDENCIES, AND APPLYING NORMALIZATIONS
IMPLEMENTATION OF CONCURRENCY CONTROL AND RECOVERY MECHANISMS
create 5 transactions for your project and execute
-- Step 1: Start transaction by updating book availability
-- Step 4: Oops! Something's wrong with second update, rollback to
-- Step 5: Continue with a safe update
Allows concurrent access; prevents other sessions from locking the table exclusively.
Prevents other sessions from locking in share mode. Used by default for DML.
Allows queries but not updates or deletes.
Prevents all other access — full table lock.
